items.headline: SpaceX Valuation Tops Amazon and Microsoft: What Share Price Would Make It the World's Largest Company?
items.summary: SpaceX's IPO has propelled it past Amazon and Microsoft in market value, positioning it as the fifth most valuable public company. The company's growth is driven by its reusable rockets and Starlink service.

items.headline: Tesla Model Y becomes Colombia’s top-selling car amid 304% EV surge

items.headline: SpaceX Stock Jumps 11% in Premarket Trading as Momentum Builds After Record-Breaking IPO
items.summary: SpaceX shares soared 11% in premarket trading following its record-breaking IPO, driven by strong investor demand and ambitious growth plans in space exploration and AI.
